options.name: -macro_pins
options.description: specify macro pin name patterns in regular expression

options.name: -max_fanin_fanout
options.description: Specify the maximum number of a pin's fanin/fanout,a pin will be ignored in tracing connectivity if its fanin/fanout larger than the specified number

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
